name: Hung Fook Tong Group Holdings Limited
summary: Hung Fook Tong Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the production, retail, wholesale, and distribution of bottled drinks and other herbal products in the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, and internationally. It offers Chinese herbal drinks and other drink products, Chinese-style soups, herbal tortoise plastron jelly, and other food products under the Hung Fook Tong brand name; and snacks, desserts, rice, noodles, and food products for Chinese festivals and other occasions. The company is also involved in the manufacturing, trading, importing, wholesaling, and distribution of bottled drinks; coupons wholesaling, catering, and plastics bottles manufacturing activities; and provision of logistics and trading services, and training courses. As of December 31, 2020, it operated 119 retail shops, including two Handmade Bakery shops in Hong Kong. The company also sells its wellness drinks to distributors in Mainland China, the United States, Canada, Malaysia, Australia, Singapore, the Philippines, New Zealand, Britain, the Netherlands, Spain, etc. Hung Fook Tong Group Holdings Limited was founded in 1986 and is based in Tai Po, Hong Kong.
